name: AccordionItemMultiple
classdesc:
JET AccordionItemMultiple

Description: The oj-c-accordion-item-multiple component renders collapsible content in a group, supporting multiple expansion mode (multiple items can be expanded at once). Use itemKey and expandedKeys to control and identify expanded items. Event handlers onOjExpand and onOjCollapse provide callbacks for responding to expansion and collapse events.

This component is typically used in Layout & Nav scenarios, such as within templates for Table, ListView, or CardView. It supports accessibility via the aria-label attribute and requires header text for screen readers.


<oj-c-accordion-item-multiple
   item-key="item1"
   expanded-keys="[[expandedKeys]]"
   on-oj-expand="[[expandHandler]]"
   on-oj-collapse="[[collapseHandler]]"
   aria-label="Details for Item 1"
>
  <h3 slot="header">Item 1</h3>
  <div>Content for Item 1</div>
</oj-c-accordion-item-multiple>

Accessibility

Specify a value for the aria-label attribute with a meaningful description of the purpose of this accordion item for accessibility. Header text is required for screen readers.

Keyboard End User Information

  • Enter/Space: Toggle expansion/collapse of the item.
  • Tab: Move focus to the next tabbable element.

Touch End User Information

  • Tap on header: Toggle expansion/collapse of the item.

Validation and Messaging

This component does not support validation or messaging directly. Use parent form components for validation if needed.

User Assistance Text

Provide clear header text and aria-labels for accessibility and user guidance.

tstype.value: interface CAccordionItemMultipleElement<K extends string | number> extends JetElement<AccordionItemMultipleElementSettableProperties<K>>

ojsignature.value: interface CAccordionItemMultipleElement<K extends string | number> extends JetElement<AccordionItemMultipleElementSettableProperties<K>>

name: itemKey
ojshortdesc: Specifies the item key of each AccordionItemMultiple.
description: Specifies the item key of each AccordionItemMultiple. Use itemKey to uniquely identify each item in the accordion.

name: expandedKeys
description: Specifies the expandedKeys property. Use expandedKeys to control which items are expanded. Bind this property to an observable array in your ViewModel (e.g., ko.ObservableArray<string>) to programmatically expand/collapse items.

name: disabled
description: Disables the item if set to true.

name: iconPosition
description: Changes chevron icon placement at the end of the collapsible header.

name: setProperty
ojshortdesc: Sets a property or a single subproperty for complex properties and notifies the component of the change, triggering a corresponding event.
description: Sets a property or a single subproperty for complex properties and notifies the component of the change, triggering a corresponding event.

params.name: property
params.description: The property name to set. Supports dot notation for subproperty access.

params.name: value
params.description: The new value to set the property to.

name: getProperty
ojshortdesc: Retrieves the value of a property or a subproperty.
description: Retrieves the value of a property or a subproperty.

params.name: property
params.description: The property name to get. Supports dot notation for subproperty access.

name: setProperties
ojshortdesc: Performs a batch set of properties.
description: Performs a batch set of properties.

params.name: properties
params.description: An object containing the property and value pairs to set.

name: ojCollapse
ojshortdesc: Triggered after the item has been collapsed (after animation completes).
description:
Note: The event detail contains the following properties: [oj-c.AccordionItemMultiple.AccordionItemMultipleDetail]{@link oj-c.AccordionItemMultiple.AccordionItemMultipleDetail}<K>

Triggered after the item has been collapsed (after animation completes).

name: ojExpand
ojshortdesc: Triggered after the item has been expanded (after animation completes).
description:
Note: The event detail contains the following properties: [oj-c.AccordionItemMultiple.AccordionItemMultipleDetail]{@link oj-c.AccordionItemMultiple.AccordionItemMultipleDetail}<K>

Triggered after the item has been expanded (after animation completes).

name: header
description:
Item's header. If not specified, the header contains only an open/close icon.
The header text is required for accessibility purposes.
ojshortdesc: Item's header. If not specified, the header contains only an open/close icon. The header text is required for accessibility purposes.

name: Default
description:
The content node to be expanded or collapsed.
Place any content to be shown/hidden inside this property.
ojshortdesc: Item's content node. Place any content to be shown/hidden inside this property.

name: AccordionItemMultipleDetail
description:
Payload for the onOjCollapse event and onOjExpand event.

All of the event payloads listed below can be found under event.detail. See Events and Listeners for additional information.

Name Type Description
from Array<K> | undefined The keys of the items that were previously expanded.
to Array<K> | null The keys of the items that are now expanded.
